     The Numbers Business Report

Booksmart (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,680,962Details
International Box Office $2,267,179
Worldwide Box Office $24,948,141
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $829,525
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,054,098
Total $1,883,623
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Two academic superstars and best friends, on the eve of their high school graduation, suddenly realize that they should have worked less and played more. Determined never to fall short of their peers, the girls set out on a mission to cram four years of fun into one night.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,933,620 (30.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.27 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:90.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,505 opening theaters/2,518 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,614,012

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 24th, 2019 (Wide) by United Artists
International Releases: May 31st, 2019 (Wide), released as Šprtky to chtěj taky (Czech Republic)
May 31st, 2019 (Wide), released as Šprtky to chcú tiež (Slovakia)
June 7th, 2019 (Wide), released as Зубрачките (Bulgaria)
June 14th, 2019 (Wide) (Germany)
June 28th, 2019 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: August 20th, 2019 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content and language throughout, drug use and drinking - all involving teens.
(Rating bulletin 2574 (Cert #51993), 4/17/2019)
Running Time: 102 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Actors Making Their Directorial Debut
Plot point: Bad Trip, LGBTQ+, Loss Of Virginity, Narcotics
Social setting: Graduation, High School
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Gloria Sanchez, Annapurna Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
